name: uBurst
description: 8HP micro-clone of Mutable Instruments Clouds running Parasites firmware. Same DSP as Clouds (stereo granular texture synth with a rolling buffer) plus five alternate engines: Pitch-shifter/Time-stretcher, Looping Delay, Spectral Madness, Oliverb (shimmer reverb), and Resonestor (Karplus-Strong string/chord resonator).

controls.name: Position
controls.description: Grain playhead location within the rolling buffer. CW travels back in time. Function changes per mode (Pre-delay in delay modes, Timbre & Duration in Resonestor).

controls.name: Size
controls.description: Grain duration. CCW very short spikes; CW longer grains. Tonal at audio-rate modulation.

controls.name: Pitch
controls.description: Grain transposition ±2 octaves. Noon = original pitch. V/Oct tracked via V/Oct input.

controls.name: Density
controls.description: Grain rate in Granular mode. Noon = no grains generated. CW = regular (constant) rate, CCW = Poisson/random rate. Function remaps per alternate mode (Diffusion, Temporal Quantisation, Decay, etc.).
controls.detail: CCW: random · noon: silent · CW: regular · CV ±5V

controls.name: Texture
controls.description: Grain envelope shape. Morphs between square, ramp-up, ramp-down, triangle, and triangle-with-diffuser windows. CCW is sharper (more glitch); CW is smoother.
controls.detail: CV ±5V · function changes per mode (Filter, Spectral Quant., Diffusion, Dampening)

controls.name: Blend
controls.description: Multi-function knob selected by short-pressing the Quality/Blend button. Cycles through Dry/Wet, Stereo Spread, Feedback, and Reverb amount. The LED color under the knob indicates the current slot.
controls.detail: 4 slots cycled by short-press · CV ±5V follows selected slot

controls.name: Freeze
controls.description: Latching button. Press once to stop buffer recording (LED lit); press again to release. Grains keep scrubbing the frozen audio. Gate input mirrors the button.
controls.detail: Latching · also gated via FREEZE input

controls.name: Quality / Blend-select button
controls.description: Small button right of the Blend knob. Short-press: cycles Blend slot. 1s hold then press: cycles audio quality (stereo 1s / mono 2s / lo-fi stereo 4s / lo-fi mono 8s). 5s hold then press: cycles the six alternate engines.
controls.detail: Short press: Blend slot · 1s hold: quality · 5s hold: mode

inputs.name: In L
inputs.description: Left audio input. Normalled to Right input when Right is unpatched (mono operation).
inputs.normalizedTo: In L feeds In R when unpatched

inputs.name: In R
inputs.description: Right audio input for stereo operation.

inputs.name: Freeze
inputs.description: Gate input. High = buffer frozen, low = recording. Mirrors the Freeze button.

inputs.name: Trigger
inputs.description: Trigger/Clock input. In Granular mode fires a single grain (with Density at noon). In delay/pitch-shifter modes acts as clock for delay-time sync. In Spectral Madness picks a random glitch algorithm. In Resonestor switches the active voice and fires a burst.

inputs.name: V/Oct
inputs.description: 1V/oct pitch input transposing grain playback (added to Pitch knob).

inputs.name: Position CV
inputs.description: CV for buffer Position (or Pre-delay / Timbre & Duration depending on mode).

inputs.name: Size CV
inputs.description: CV for grain Size (or Spectral Warp / Reverb Size / Chord depending on mode). Accepts audio-rate.

inputs.name: Density CV
inputs.description: CV for grain Density (or Diffusion / Temporal Quant. / Decay depending on mode).

inputs.name: Texture CV
inputs.description: CV for Texture (or LP/HP Filter / Spectral Quant. / Dampening depending on mode).

inputs.name: Blend CV
inputs.description: CV for the currently selected Blend slot (Dry/Wet, Spread, Feedback, or Reverb).

behaviors.name: Granular Processing (default)
behaviors.description: Stereo grain cloud reading from the rolling buffer. Position scans, Size sets grain length, Density sets rate (noon = no grains, CCW = random/Poisson, CW = constant), Texture morphs the grain window.

behaviors.name: Pitch-shifter / Time-stretcher mode
behaviors.trigger: hold Quality button 5s until yellow, then press once
behaviors.description: Two overlapping grain windows spliced to the input's dominant period. Size controls window length, Pitch transposes independently of time, Density becomes Diffusion, Texture becomes LP/HP Filter. Position becomes a clock divider/multiplier for pre-delay when a clock is patched to Trigger.

behaviors.name: Looping Delay mode
behaviors.description: Pitch-shifting looping delay. Position is pre-delay, Size is delay-time window, Pitch transposes repeats (pitch at 0 bypasses the pitch-shifter for clean delay), Density is Diffusion, Texture is LP/HP Filter. Trigger syncs delay time to external clock.

behaviors.name: Spectral Madness mode
behaviors.trigger: 5s hold Quality, then press three times
behaviors.description: FFT phase vocoder. Position scans spectral frames, Spectral Warp (Size) shifts/wraps bins, Temporal Quantisation (Density) controls FFT refresh rate (past noon adds phase randomization), Spectral Quantisation (Texture) sets bin resolution. Trigger fires a random glitch algorithm (spectral hold, shift-and-alias, kill largest harmonic, or nasty high-pass).

behaviors.name: Oliverb mode
behaviors.trigger: 5s hold Quality, then press four times
behaviors.description: Shimmer reverb. Pre-delay (Position), Reverb Size (Size), Pitch Shift fed back into the reverb loop (±1 oct, CW = classic shimmer), Decay (Density, past 3 o'clock self-oscillates), Diffusion (Texture). Blend slots remap to Dry/Wet, Dampening, LFO Speed, LFO Amount.

behaviors.name: Resonestor mode
behaviors.trigger: 5s hold Quality, then press five times
behaviors.description: Karplus-Strong resonator. Timbre & Duration (Position) shapes the noise burst, Chord (Size) selects 16 chord types, Pitch sets base frequency (noon = A3/220Hz), Decay (Density), Dampening (Texture). Burst input (Trigger) switches between two voices (duophony). Blend slots remap to Dry/Wet, Stereo split, Scatter, Harmonics.

behaviors.name: Freeze captures the buffer
behaviors.description: Stops buffer recording. Grains keep reading the last-captured audio. Combine with slow Position scrub for infinite-hold ambient effects.

behaviors.name: Audio-rate Size modulation
behaviors.description: Modulating grain Size at audio rate produces FM-like sidebands and glitch artifacts — classic Clouds/uBurst sound.

behaviors.name: Audio quality / lo-fi buffer
behaviors.trigger: 1s hold Quality, then press to cycle
behaviors.description: Four settings trade sample rate and bit depth for buffer length: 32kHz 16-bit stereo 1s · 32kHz 16-bit mono 2s · 16kHz 8-bit stereo 4s · 16kHz 8-bit mono 8s. Lower settings add lo-fi crunch and a longer capture window.

patchIdeas.name: Spectral freeze drone
patchIdeas.patch: Spectral Madness mode with Freeze held and slow LFOs on Position and Size — infinite evolving harmonic drone.
steps: Hold the small Quality/Blend-select button (right of the Blend knob) for 5 seconds until the Blend LED turns yellow, then short-press Quality three times to land on Spectral Madness (LED indicates the mode).
Short-press Quality until the Blend LED is green (Dry/Wet slot), turn the Blend knob fully CW (all wet).
Starting positions: Position noon, Spectral Warp (Size) at noon, Pitch at noon, Temporal Quantisation (Density) at noon, Spectral Quantisation (Texture) at noon.
Patch your source (pad, guitar, field rec) -> uBurst In L. In R is normalled from In L for mono.
Play a few seconds of source, then press Freeze. The LED lights and the buffer stops recording.
Patch a slow LFO (cycle ~30s) -> uBurst Position CV — sweeps through spectral frames.
Patch a second slow LFO (cycle ~15s) -> uBurst Size CV — animates the warp.
Patch uBurst Out L -> Mixer L and Out R -> Mixer R.
patchIdeas.signalOut: Out L / Out R — stereo phase-vocoder drone, ±8V, stays frozen until you release Freeze.
patchIdeas.hear: A continuous harmonic wash where partials drift in and out as the Warp LFO moves. The frame-scan LFO keeps it from locking into one tone — you hear the source's harmonics smeared across pitch.
patchIdeas.diagram:
uBurst:
* Mode: Spectral Madness (5s hold Quality + 3 presses)
* Freeze: ON
* Blend slot: Dry/Wet, full CW
- Source (Out) -> uBurst (In L)
- LFO 1 (Slow) >> uBurst (Position CV)
- LFO 2 (Slower) >> uBurst (Size CV)
- uBurst (Out L) -> Mixer (In L)
- uBurst (Right Out) -> Mixer (In R)

patchIdeas.name: Pitched reverb
patchIdeas.patch: Pitch-shifter/Time-stretcher mode with a quantized melody on V/Oct and heavy reverb in the Blend slot.
steps: Hold Quality 5s until yellow LED, then short-press Quality once to select Pitch-shifter/Time-stretcher mode.
Short-press Quality until the Blend LED is yellow (Reverb slot), set the Blend knob to ~3 o'clock for a wet tail.
Size at ~1 o'clock (medium window), Diffusion (Density) at ~1 o'clock, LP/HP Filter (Texture) at noon.
Pitch knob at noon — V/Oct will set the transposition.
Patch a VCO or sampled voice -> uBurst In L.
Patch a quantizer or sequencer pitch CV -> uBurst V/Oct — each step re-pitches the grain engine.
Patch uBurst Out L -> Mixer L and Out R -> Mixer R.
patchIdeas.signalOut: Out L / Out R — transposed source with long reverb tail, ±8V stereo.
patchIdeas.hear: Each V/Oct step transposes the whole wet signal by that interval — the reverb tail climbs and falls with the sequence like a haunted choir.
patchIdeas.diagram:
uBurst:
* Mode: Pitch-shifter/Time-stretcher (5s hold + 1 press)
* Blend slot: Reverb (yellow), ~3 o'clock
* Size: ~1 o'clock
- VCO (Out) -> uBurst (In L)
- Quantizer (Out) p> uBurst (V/Oct)
- uBurst (Out L) -> Mixer (In L)
- uBurst (Right Out) -> Mixer (In R)

patchIdeas.name: Granular stutter
patchIdeas.patch: One grain per clock pulse with Density at noon — rhythmic micro-slicing of incoming audio.
steps: Confirm Granular mode (default on power-up, Blend LED green). If unsure, hold Quality 5s and short-press to cycle back to Granular.
Short-press Quality until Blend LED is green (Dry/Wet slot), turn Blend fully CW (all wet so only grains are heard).
Set Density to exactly noon — at this setting no grains spawn automatically; only external triggers fire grains.
Size at ~10 o'clock (very short grains), Texture CCW for sharp/glitchy windows, Pitch at noon.
Patch your source (drum loop, vocal) -> uBurst In L.
Patch a clock or rhythmic gate (16th notes work well) -> uBurst Trigger — each pulse fires one grain.
Patch uBurst Out L -> Output L and Out R -> Output R.
patchIdeas.signalOut: Out L / Out R — one grain per clock pulse, ±8V, rhythmically stuttered source.
patchIdeas.hear: Your source chopped into tiny slices on every clock step — a glitchy rhythmic stutter. Shorter Size = clickier slices; wider Texture = smoother micro-slices.
patchIdeas.diagram:
uBurst:
* Mode: Granular
* Density: noon (1 grain per TRIG)
* Size: very short
* Blend slot: Dry/Wet, full CW
- Source (Out) -> uBurst (In L)
- Clock (Out) c> uBurst (Trigger)
- uBurst (Left Out) -> Output (In L)
- uBurst (Right Out) -> Output (In R)

patchIdeas.name: Looping delay with degradation
patchIdeas.patch: Looping Delay mode with LFO on the filter and envelope-swept feedback — decaying dub delays.
steps: Hold Quality 5s, then short-press twice to enter Looping Delay mode.
Short-press Quality until Blend LED is orange (Feedback slot), Blend knob at ~2 o'clock for 3-4 audible repeats.
Position (Pre-delay) at noon, Size at noon (~medium delay time), Pitch at 0 to bypass the pitch-shifter for clean delays.
Diffusion (Density) at ~1 o'clock, LP/HP Filter (Texture) at noon as a starting point.
Patch your source -> uBurst In L.
Patch a slow LFO -> uBurst Texture CV for filter motion that sweeps each repeat.
Patch an envelope (triggered by your rhythm) -> uBurst Density CV for diffusion swells.
Patch uBurst Out L -> Output L and Out R -> Output R.
patchIdeas.signalOut: Out L / Out R — dry + delayed source with moving filter and diffusion, ±8V.
patchIdeas.hear: A dub delay that slowly filters down and smears each repeat. The LFO darkens/brightens the tail; the envelope makes each hit bloom into a diffused cloud.
patchIdeas.diagram:
uBurst:
* Mode: Looping Delay (5s hold + 2 presses)
* Blend slot: Feedback (orange), ~2 o'clock
* Pitch: 0 (bypass)
- Source (Out) -> uBurst (In L)
- LFO (Out) >> uBurst (Texture CV)
- Envelope (Out) >> uBurst (Density CV)
- uBurst (Left Out) -> Output (In L)
- uBurst (Right Out) -> Output (In R)

patchIdeas.name: Freeze-chopped reverb tail
patchIdeas.patch: Reverb feeds uBurst in Granular mode, euclidean gates toggle Freeze, LFO drifts Position inside each freeze.
steps: Confirm Granular mode (Blend LED green).
Short-press Quality until Blend LED is green (Dry/Wet), Blend knob full CW (all wet).
Position at noon, Size at ~1 o'clock, Density at ~2 o'clock (thick cloud), Texture at noon.
Patch an external reverb (e.g. Desmodus Versio) Left Out -> uBurst In L.
Patch a euclidean gate sequencer -> uBurst Freeze input — each pulse latches Freeze on/off, chopping the tail.
Patch a slow LFO (cycle ~4s) -> uBurst Position CV — drifts the playhead during each frozen window.
Patch uBurst Out L -> Mixer L and Out R -> Mixer R.
patchIdeas.signalOut: Out L / Out R — gated granular reverb tail, ±8V, drifts while each freeze window holds.
patchIdeas.hear: The reverb tail gets chopped into rhythmic blooms. During each frozen chunk the LFO scrubs Position so the tail still mutates slightly — rhythmic stutters with living content underneath.
patchIdeas.diagram:
uBurst:
* Mode: Granular
* Blend slot: Dry/Wet, full CW
- Desmodus Versio (Out L) -> uBurst (In L)
- Euclidean Gate (Out) t> uBurst (Freeze)
- LFO (Out) >> uBurst (Position CV)
- uBurst (Left Out) -> Mixer (In L)
- uBurst (Right Out) -> Mixer (In R)

patchIdeas.name: Parasites looping delay disintegration
patchIdeas.patch: Looping Delay with feedback near runaway, slow Position warble, and lo-fi buffer — the loop falls apart.
steps: Hold Quality 5s then press twice for Looping Delay mode.
Hold Quality 1s then short-press until the 3rd quality LED (16kHz 8-bit stereo, 4s buffer) lights red — lo-fi crunch plus a longer buffer.
Short-press Quality until Blend LED is orange (Feedback slot), Blend knob at ~2 o'clock (just shy of runaway).
Position (Pre-delay) at noon, Size at ~1 o'clock, Pitch at 0 to bypass the pitch-shifter, Diffusion (Density) at ~1 o'clock, LP/HP Filter (Texture) fully CW (bright/HP).
Patch your source -> uBurst In L. Play a few seconds, then press Freeze to lock the loop.
Patch a very slow LFO (cycle ~20s) -> uBurst Position CV — warble detunes repeats slowly.
Patch uBurst Out L -> Output L and Out R -> Output R.
Nudge Feedback CCW if it screams; CW to revive.
patchIdeas.signalOut: Out L / Out R — self-feeding, warbling, bit-crushed loop, ±8V.
patchIdeas.hear: The loop starts recognizable, then bit-crush grit and slow pitch warble eat it from the inside — each repeat slightly more damaged until it collapses into abstract texture.
patchIdeas.diagram:
uBurst:
* Mode: Looping Delay
* Quality: 16kHz 8-bit stereo (4s)
* Blend slot: Feedback (orange), ~2 o'clock
* Freeze: ON (after capture)
- Source (Out) -> uBurst (In L)
- Slow LFO (Out) >> uBurst (Position CV)
- uBurst (Left Out) -> Output (In L)
- uBurst (Right Out) -> Output (In R)

patchIdeas.name: Clouds-frozen Rings excitation
patchIdeas.patch: Capture a drum loop, freeze it, modulate Position at audio rate, use the grains to excite Rings.
steps: Confirm Granular mode (Blend LED green).
Short-press Quality until Blend LED is green (Dry/Wet), Blend knob full CW (all wet grains, no dry).
Position at noon, Size at ~11 o'clock (small grains), Density at ~2 o'clock (dense cloud), Texture at noon.
Patch a 1-bar drum loop -> uBurst In L. Let one bar record, then press Freeze.
Patch a VCO square wave (100-500Hz) -> uBurst Position CV — audio-rate scrubbing creates FM-metallic spectral morphing.
Patch uBurst Out L -> Rings IN (excitation input).
Patch Rings ODD -> Mixer L and EVEN -> Mixer R.
patchIdeas.signalOut: Rings ODD/EVEN — sympathetic string resonance excited by the frozen, audio-rate-scrubbed grains, ±8V stereo.
patchIdeas.hear: Rings rings like struck strings, but the 'mallet' is a frozen drum loop being scrubbed at audio rate — a continuous metallic hum whose pitch tracks the VCO, harmonics tracking the drums underneath.
patchIdeas.diagram:
uBurst:
* Mode: Granular
* Freeze: ON (1-bar drum capture)
* Blend slot: Dry/Wet, full CW
- Drums (Out) -> uBurst (In L)
- VCO (Square) >> uBurst (Position CV)
- uBurst (Left Out) -> Rings (IN)
- Rings (ODD) -> Mixer (In L)
- Rings (EVEN) -> Mixer (In R)
